name_en: New Small Bucket Bag, Imported Cracked Leather, Color: Light Purple, Size: 15*17*19
name_cn:
New Small Bucket Bag, Imported Cracked Leather, Color: Light Purple, Size: 15*17*19
Balenciaga Paris's latest LeCagole Bucket Bag is equipped with a heart-shaped mini mirror, the mini card holder is so cool 🆒
